properties.zone_status_reason: Local authorities are responding to a brush fire. Residents should remain alert, follow Law and Fire instructions, and stay prepared for changing conditions. Keep windows and doors closed due to smoke nearby. Call 911 for emergency assistance. Register for emergency alerts at AlertLA.org.

Due to operations related to the building fire on June 17, 2026, a Smoke Advisory remains in place for this area. Individuals with sensitivity to smoke should continue to monitor AQMD Air Quality alerts (AQMD.gov) and avoid unnecessary exposure to outdoor air. For emergencies call 911. LAFD.org/Alerts
